label: the letter A
association: A is for Acorn — gathered from beneath the oak in the orchard!

label: the letter B
association: B is for Barn — where the animals sleep safe and warm at night!

label: the letter C
association: C is for Chicken — pecking for seeds in the sunny yard!

label: the letter D
association: D is for Duck — waddling down to the pond each morning!

label: the letter E
association: E is for Egg — laid fresh and warm in the henhouse!

label: the letter F
association: F is for Fence — keeping the animals safe in the pasture!

label: the letter G
association: G is for Goat — climbing and grazing on the hillside!

label: the letter H
association: H is for Hay — stacked high in the loft all summer long!

label: the letter I
association: I is for Iris — blooming purple in the homestead garden bed!

label: the letter J
association: J is for Jar — filled with golden honey from the beehive!

label: the letter K
association: K is for Kale — growing tall in the kitchen garden!

label: the letter L
association: L is for Lamb — skipping and leaping through the spring pasture!

label: the letter M
association: M is for Milk — fresh and creamy from the dairy cow!

label: the letter N
association: N is for Nest — where the bluebird hatches her eggs in the apple tree!

label: the letter O
association: O is for Orchard — full of apple and pear trees to harvest!

label: the letter P
association: P is for Pig — rolling happily in the cool mud!

label: the letter Q
association: Q is for Quail — calling to her chicks at the edge of the meadow!

label: the letter R
association: R is for Rooster — crowing loud to wake the farm at sunrise!

label: the letter S
association: S is for Silo — storing the grain harvest safe through winter!

label: the letter T
association: T is for Tractor — rumbling across the field at planting time!

label: the letter U
association: U is for Udder — full of warm milk on a cold morning!

label: the letter V
association: V is for Vine — climbing the garden trellis toward the sun!

label: the letter W
association: W is for Well — where we draw up cool water from deep in the earth!

label: the letter X
association: X is for the Ox — the strong ox that pulls the plow through the field!

label: the letter Y
association: Y is for Yarn — spun soft and warm from the sheep's wool!

label: the letter Z
association: Z is for Zucchini — growing big and green in the summer garden!
